name: Potion of Healing
description: Potion of Healing. Ingredient: Glistering Melon. Restores health. Base: awkward potion.

name: Extended Potion of Healing
description: Extended Potion of Healing. Redstone extends duration. Lasts twice as long.

name: Strong Potion of Healing
description: Strong Potion of Healing. Glowstone increases potency. Effect level II instead of I.

name: Sharpness Enchantment
description: Sharpness: +1 damage per level. Applied to: sword/axe (max level 5). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 5 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Smite Enchantment
description: Smite: +2.5 damage to undead/level. Applied to: sword (max level 5). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 5 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Bane of Arthropods Enchantment
description: Bane of Arthropods: +2.5 to spiders/bees/level. Applied to: sword (max level 5). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 5 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Fire Aspect Enchantment
description: Fire Aspect: Sets target on fire. Applied to: sword (max level 2). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 2 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Looting Enchantment
description: Looting: +1 per level mob loot. Applied to: sword (max level 3). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 3 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Sweeping Edge Enchantment
description: Sweeping Edge: +50% sweeping damage/level. Applied to: sword (max level 3). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 3 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Efficiency Enchantment
description: Efficiency: +30% mining speed/level. Applied to: tools (max level 5). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 5 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Fortune Enchantment
description: Fortune: Multiplies ore drops. Applied to: pickaxe (max level 3). Great for diamond/netherite mining. Enchantment level 3 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Silk Touch Enchantment
description: Silk Touch: Mines block itself. Applied to: tools. Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 1 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Unbreaking Enchantment
description: Unbreaking: Chance to not consume durability. Applied to: all (max level 3). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 3 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Mending Enchantment
description: Mending: XP repairs item. Applied to: all. Best paired with Unbreaking III. Enchantment level 1 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Protection Enchantment
description: Protection: Reduces all damage 4%/level. Applied to: armor (max level 4). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 4 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Fire Protection Enchantment
description: Fire Protection: Reduces fire damage 8%/level. Applied to: armor (max level 4). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 4 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Blast Protection Enchantment
description: Blast Protection: Reduces explosion damage 8%/level. Applied to: armor (max level 4). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 4 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Projectile Protection Enchantment
description: Projectile Protection: Reduces projectile damage 8%/level. Applied to: armor (max level 4). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 4 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Feather Falling Enchantment
description: Feather Falling: Reduces fall damage 12%/level. Applied to: boots (max level 4). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 4 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Thorns Enchantment
description: Thorns: Returns damage to attacker. Applied to: armor (max level 3). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 3 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Depth Strider Enchantment
description: Depth Strider: Faster underwater movement. Applied to: boots (max level 3). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 3 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Respiration Enchantment
description: Respiration: Extended underwater breathing. Applied to: helmet (max level 3). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 3 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Aqua Affinity Enchantment
description: Aqua Affinity: Normal mining speed underwater. Applied to: helmet. Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 1 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Soul Speed Enchantment
description: Soul Speed: Faster on soul sand/soil. Applied to: boots (max level 3). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 3 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Power Enchantment
description: Power: +25% arrow damage/level. Applied to: bow (max level 5). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 5 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Punch Enchantment
description: Punch: Knocks back targets. Applied to: bow (max level 2). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 2 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Flame Enchantment
description: Flame: Sets arrows on fire. Applied to: bow. Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 1 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Infinity Enchantment
description: Infinity: Shoots without consuming arrows. Applied to: bow. Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 1 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Multishot Enchantment
description: Multishot: Fires 3 arrows. Applied to: crossbow. Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 1 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Piercing Enchantment
description: Piercing: Passes through entities. Applied to: crossbow (max level 4). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 4 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Quick Charge Enchantment
description: Quick Charge: Faster loading. Applied to: crossbow (max level 3). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 3 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Loyalty Enchantment
description: Loyalty: Returns after throw. Applied to: trident (max level 3). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 3 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Impaling Enchantment
description: Impaling: +2.5 damage to aquatic/level. Applied to: trident (max level 5). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 5 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Riptide Enchantment
description: Riptide: Launches with throw in rain/water. Applied to: trident (max level 3). Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 3 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Channeling Enchantment
description: Channeling: Summons lightning in storms. Applied to: trident. Obtain from enchanting table (15 bookshelves) or librarian villagers. Enchantment level 1 achievable via anvil combining.

name: Wooden Pickaxe
description: Wooden Pickaxe. Durability varies. Mines stone/coal. Craft from 3 planks + 2 sticks.

name: Wooden Axe
description: Wooden Axe. Used to chop wood and strip logs. Craft from 3 planks + 2 sticks. Can be used as melee weapon.

name: Wooden Sword
description: Wooden Sword. Melee weapon. Craft from 2 planks + 1 stick. Damage: 4.

name: Wooden Helmet
description: Wooden Helmet. Worn in head slot. Provides armor protection. Craft from 5 wooden ingots in shaped pattern.

name: Wooden Chestplate
description: Wooden Chestplate. Worn in chest slot. Provides armor protection. Craft from 8 wooden ingots in shaped pattern.

name: Wooden Leggings
description: Wooden Leggings. Worn in legs slot. Provides armor protection. Craft from 7 wooden ingots in shaped pattern.

name: Wooden Boots
description: Wooden Boots. Worn in feet slot. Provides armor protection. Craft from 4 wooden ingots in shaped pattern.
